name: org-operations
description: Organizational operating system. Policy as the foundation of all work.

gates.description: Phase completion sign-off before next phase begins
gates.ai_pre_review_prompt: You are auditing a phase completion gate. Review the phase summary, all completed plans, and any outstanding items. Check: (1) Are all required plans complete? (2) Are there unresolved critiques or blockers? (3) Does the phase have unaddressed risks? Provide a readiness assessment.

gates.description: Policy must be reviewed before going active
gates.ai_pre_review_prompt: You are reviewing a policy for activation. Check: (1) Is the policy content complete and coherent? (2) Are dependencies or related policies referenced? (3) Is there a clear effective date and scope? (4) Are there any security, compliance, or operational risks? Provide a readiness assessment.

gates.description: Plan owner confirms completion before closing
gates.ai_pre_review_prompt: You are auditing a plan completion. Review the plan body for: (1) Are all implementation steps marked done? (2) Are there pending (⏳) items? (3) Is test coverage verified? (4) Are rollback procedures documented? (5) Are there unresolved risks? Provide a readiness assessment.

gates.description: Active policies must be reviewed quarterly
gates.ai_pre_review_prompt: You are auditing a scheduled policy review. Check: (1) Is the policy still relevant? (2) Are there references to superseded documents or systems? (3) Are there gaps identified since the last review? (4) Does the policy need updates? Provide a readiness assessment with specific recommendations.
